input: My car was rear-ended at a stop light and the rear bumper is crushed.
A deer ran into my vehicle on the highway and damaged the front fender.
Someone backed into my parked truck in the lot and dented the door panel.
A burst pipe flooded my basement overnight and ruined the drywall.
A kitchen fire left smoke damage across the living room walls.
I slipped on a wet floor at the store and fractured my wrist.
Whiplash from the accident has me in physical therapy twice a week.
A duplicate of this repair invoice was already paid under another policy.
The claimant reports a collision, but the damage is inconsistent with the police report and looks staged.
